calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-06-2006 Continued To Jan-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2006 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-18-2006 Continued To Dec-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: John Boessenecker appearing for and with Herman Stewart. Kesha Stewart-Cromartie, former administrator of estate appearing in pro per. Court understands that things have been taken care of except for the $5,000.00 reserve. Mr. Boessenecker wants more time for investigation. Court is ordering the administrator to file an accounting on the $5,000.00 reserve by 11/29. Mr. Boessenecker will get verification of the check. Matter is continued to 12/6. Judge: Raymond J. Arata. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2006 Continued To Dec-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-20-2006 Continued To Oct-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: John Boessenecker appearing for petitioner Herman Stewart. The administrator is not in court. Counsel informs the Court that the administrator has called her sister and said she has done nothing wrong. He wants to have a hearing for default proof up. Court is issuing an OSC to the administrator for failure to appear and for failure to abide to the Court's order. Return date is 10/18. Matter is continued to 10/18 for default proof up. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton, CSR #1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Cruz.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-23-2006 Continued To Sep-20-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Setting Aside Decree Of Discharge On Grounds Of Fraud And For Order Surcharging Administrator
Off Calendar Jun-27-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: John Boessenecker appearing for and with petitioner Herman Stewart. The administrator is not in court. Mr. Boessenecker has not seen the receipt. He is going to get the bank records. Court is setting aside the discharge. Damage issue is reserved. Counsel to prepare order. Court is setting a status hearing on 8/23. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
